author: SantiMod
content:
Star Atlas Town Hall - Major Preseason Release is TODAY!

The most anticipated drop of the Community Week is here… and it’s a game-changer. 

What's happening:
A full walkthrough of the Major Preseason Release,Live details on what’s new in this new UE5 Release,The next steps in the journey to Star Atlas Season 0,Dev insights, gameplay reveals, and community Q&A,
Join us live to earn precious Community Carnival Tickets and the Exclusive Badge Code!
